methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: US escort mission in Strait of Hormuz sparks Iranian cease‑fire warning
bullets: The United States announced it will begin escorting commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz.
Iran's leadership warned that the escort operation breaches the existing cease‑fire and threatens regional stability.
The confrontation raises the risk of naval incidents that could disrupt critical maritime traffic in the Gulf.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Watch for rapid escalation between US naval escorts and Iranian forces in the Strait.
